content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a" instead of explaining how to reach the paywall/subscription flow or bypass it.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated features like the subscription paywall in PaywallView.swift, especially since IAP review can stall without guidance on testing purchase flows. Credentials alone aren't enough — replace "n/a" with concrete instructions (e.g., "Sign in with the credentials above, then tap Subscribe on the paywall screen; use sandbox tester X for purchase testing").
